# Cold Email Outreach — Vendor Directory

20 vendors catalogued. Each folder contains `capabilities.md` (what it can do) and `pricing.md` (what it costs).

## ⚠️ Vendor Selection Rules — Read Before Recommending

Two hard rules to follow when selecting vendors for a TCO analysis:

**Rule 1 — Cost-first ranking.**
The recommended option must be the lowest verified incremental cost that covers all required use cases. To recommend a more expensive option you must cite a specific wiki fact (a documented limitation, a ✓ vs △ rating difference) that justifies the premium. Unverified qualitative judgments (e.g. "feels more reliable") are not valid reasons. If no wiki fact supports the premium, recommend the cheaper option and let the user decide.

**Rule 2 — Exhaustive price comparison before selection.**
For each required use case, read ALL vendors in this index rated ✓ for that use case, then sort by price at the user's stated volume. Never anchor on a vendor mentioned earlier in the analysis. The cheapest ✓-rated vendor must be identified first; only then can a more expensive option be justified by a specific wiki fact.

> ✅ Validation check: Before finalising any recommendation, confirm — "Have I read the pricing.md for every ✓-rated vendor covering each required use case, and sorted them by cost at the user's volume?" If no, go back and do it.

## Full-Stack Outreach Platforms
Do prospecting → verification → warm-up → sequencing → inbox in one subscription.

| Vendor | Folder | Best For |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Snov.io | [[vendors/snov-io/capabilities\|snov-io]] | All-in-one at best value; credits cover all features |
| Apollo | [[vendors/apollo/capabilities\|apollo]] | Strongest ICP database + CRM + sequencing in one |
| Instantly | [[vendors/instantly/capabilities\|instantly]] | High-volume email; best-in-class warm-up network; flat fee |
| Lemlist | [[vendors/lemlist/capabilities\|lemlist]] | Multichannel (email + LinkedIn + calls); visual personalisation |
| Saleshandy | [[vendors/saleshandy/capabilities\|saleshandy]] | Best value flat-fee; unlimited team; 700M+ database |
| HubSpot | [[vendors/hubspot/capabilities\|hubspot]] | CRM-native sequences; best for teams already on HubSpot |

## Data Enrichment & Orchestration
Sit upstream — enrich and personalise data, then push to a sequencer.

| Vendor | Folder | Best For |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Clay | [[vendors/clay/capabilities\|clay]] | 150+ providers; Claygent AI research; multi-provider waterfall |
| n8n | [[vendors/n8n/capabilities\|n8n]] | Full programmatic control; self-hosted; open-source |
| Make | [[vendors/make/capabilities\|make]] | Visual no-code automation; easier than n8n |
| Gumloop | [[vendors/gumloop/capabilities\|gumloop]] | AI-native workflow orchestration |

## AI Agents
Autonomous agents that handle personalisation and/or inbox management.

| Vendor | Folder | Best For |
|--------|--------|----------|
| Claude Code | [[vendors/claude-code/capabilities\|claude-code]] | AI-generated icebreakers from live prospect research; MCP |
| OpenAI Codex | [[vendors/openai-codex/capabilities\|openai-codex]] | Gmail-native reply drafting in your voice |
| Hermes Agent | [[vendors/hermes-agent/capabilities\|hermes-agent]] | Cross-platform autonomous agent; persistent memory |
| OpenClaw | [[vendors/openclaw/capabilities\|openclaw]] | Autonomous inbox triage; 80–90% replies handled automatically |

## Point Solutions — Prospecting & Verification
Specialist tools for specific parts of the stack.

| Vendor | Folder | Speciality |
|--------|--------|------------|
| Prospeo | [[vendors/prospeo/capabilities\|prospeo]] | Email finding + phone; 98% accuracy; 300M+ profiles |
| SalesQL | [[vendors/salesql/capabilities\|salesql]] | LinkedIn Chrome extension; reverse email lookup |
| ProxyCurl | [[vendors/proxycurl/capabilities\|proxycurl]] | Deepest LinkedIn profile data via API |
| Fresh LinkedIn Scraper | [[vendors/fresh-linkedin-scraper/capabilities\|fresh-linkedin-scraper]] | LinkedIn profile + posts scraping via RapidAPI; used in lead enrichment pipeline |
| Lix | [[vendors/lix/capabilities\|lix]] | LinkedIn bulk export; credits only for valid emails |
| MillionVerifier | [[vendors/millionverifier/capabilities\|millionverifier]] | Best-in-class email verification; 99%+ accuracy; catch-all engine |
